purpose: Upstream tlog-bitcoin-anchor rootcommit conformance vectors (v1 = domain-separated preimage folding Merkle root + operator wallet under a Bitcoin OpenTimestamps attestation; v2-sig = the same commitment plus a wallet EIP-191/secp256k1 signature). Vendored as PURE DATA (no executable payload reaches proofbundle's verify path). proofbundle ships its OWN second-implementation verifier for this format in src/proofbundle/anchors_rootcommit.py (tests/test_anchors_rootcommit.py): it independently rebuilds the domain-separated preimage from each checkpoint's own (origin, size, root) plus the wallet in the anchor line, recomputes SHA-256(preimage), and reuses proofbundle's OpenTimestamps binding verifier. It reproduces the upstream expected outcomes for v1 (4/4) and for the v2-sig BINDING (root/wallet/proof tamper) using only proofbundle[anchors]. NO-OVERCLAIM: the v2-sig SIGNATURE outcomes (EIP-191 recovery to the bound wallet) need an additional secp256k1+keccak backend; without it those two signature-specific outcomes are honestly reported as sig_ok=None / status no_sig_lib and their tests skip, never a silent pass. Credit + provenance pinned at 9034202.

upstream.author: Markovian Protocol / Colin <hello@quantsynth.net>
upstream.verification: The 11 per-file SHA-256 digests below were independently recomputed by b7n0de/proofbundle on retrieval at commit 9034202: 11/11 match. proofbundle now re-derives the upstream expected outcomes with its OWN second-implementation verifier (src/proofbundle/anchors_rootcommit.py, tests/test_anchors_rootcommit.py): v1 (4/4, our rebuilt preimage hashes to committed_preimage_sha256) and the v2-sig binding under [anchors], plus the v2-sig EIP-191 signature under the optional [rootcommit] backend (see NO-OVERCLAIM in purpose for the honest degradation when that backend is absent).

files.case: real anchor; the domain-separated preimage commits (root, wallet)
files.expect: known_anchors=1, binding=true, reject=false (re-derived by proofbundle anchors_rootcommit)

files.case: root line altered; preimage no longer matches the proof
wallet altered in the opaque section; preimage no longer matches the proof
upstream rootcommit/v1 corpus manifest (expected outcomes), vendored verbatim
files.expect: informative only; proofbundle does not execute upstream code

files.case: real anchor plus a valid wallet EIP-191 signature over the commitment
wallet altered in the opaque section
upstream rootcommit/v2-sig corpus manifest (expected outcomes), vendored verbatim
files.expect: informative only; proofbundle does not execute upstream code
